## FakeEventStreamReader Class

In\-memory implementation of [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.IEventStreamReader](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/hexalith.eventstore.server.events.ieventstreamreader 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.IEventStreamReader') for unit testing\.
